briefs.title: BC Provincial Nominee Program fee rises from $1,475 to $1,750 effective January 22, 2026
briefs.summary: BC raised the application fee for its Provincial Immigration Programs (the BC Provincial Nominee Program, which lets employers sponsor foreign workers for permanent residency) from $1,475 to $1,750.
briefs.action_required: Update your immigration budget and inform any candidates you are sponsoring about the new $1,750 fee.

key_dates.label: BC Provincial Nominee Program fee increase to $1,750 takes effect
